productDisplayName: Puma Men's Vibrant White Black Red Shoe
description: The Vibrant V range of shoes from puma are meant for a variety of indoor Sports and training. Made of superior quality material and a non marking sole, these shoes look stylish and perform well. Upper Synthetic upper for durable protection Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for stability and style Appliqued cat logo on the tongue to create a fashion statement Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Mesh tongue for breathability Midsole EcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort and support Removable sole insert to add an orthotic OrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off IdCELL to improve shock absorption and protect the feet EverTrack used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areas Non-marking sole in multi-directional pattern for superior grip
